description: Accepted content-loss flags for the unity-doc-corpus audit (known false-positive classes, triaged per the M0042 spec). audit --baseline exits zero iff every gating flag is covered by an entry AT OR BELOW its recorded magnitude and the corpus page count has not shrunk below page_count; a covered page that worsens re-gates. Regenerate with --write-baseline only after a human triages the change.
